title: Voodoo Doll
description: A doll that you cannot cuddle with...
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sRiBn6ka2sA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




<details>
<summary>Abilities</summary>

**Binding** (Hold the doll in offhand)
- Attack a mob to set it as a target.
- Right Click to set yourself as a target.
- Shift Right Click to clear all targets
- Every target has 15 "bind" until they are no longer a selected target. Only the closest target will be affected.

**Twisting [-1]** (No items held in offhand)
- Turn the target's facing direction. Look slightly up to turn them left and look slightly down to turn them right.

**Smearing [-1]** (Must hold potion ingredients in offhand)
- Use the doll while having a potion ingredient on your offhand to apply the effect to the target (item will be consumed)

> Absorption - Honey Comb

> Blindness - Ink Sac

> Fire Resistance - Magma Cream

> Glowing - Glow Berry

> Invisibility - Amethyst Shard

> Night Vision - Golden Carrot

> Poison - Spider Eye

> Regeneration - Ghast Tear

> Slow Falling - Phantom Membrane 

> Water Breathing - Pufferfish

> Chorus Fruit - Teleportation

> Blaze Powder - Ablaze

**Pinning [-2]** (Must hold iron nuggies in offhand)
- Heart: Pushing a pin into the heart, killing the target. (Target must be 5 hearts or less)
- Arms: Pushing a pin into the arms, giving the target mining fatigue and weakness.
- Legs: Pushing a pin into the legs, giving them slowness and the disability to jump.
(Shift Right Click to switch between selections)

**Tracking [N/A]** (Must hold recovery compass in offhand)
- Displays the targets coordinates ` X.Y.Z.Xrot`


</details>

# Resource Pack Required
[Resource Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/player-s-universal-resourcepack/)
You need [CitResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)
# Bug Reporting
[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/eYaAp3SqPA)
